untranslatable_reason: This signal requires options-specific Greek metrics (vega, moneyness levels: ATM/ITM/OTM, implied volatility) that are not available in the allowed indicator set. The backtest engine supports only equity price action and technical indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.), not derivatives Greeks or volatility surface analysis. Translation would require vega comparison across strike prices and moneyness classification, which cannot be expressed using the provided indicators.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_53_0 is an options strategy rule about concentrating volatility exposure in at-the-money options due to their higher vega. This requires real-time vega calculations and options chain data, which are fundamentally different from equity technical analysis. The signal is conceptually sound but architecturally incompatible with this backtesting framework.
